texto: There are three key questions that must/should guide you in life
autor: 1. What is your identity?2. What is /are your value(s) to others? and3. Where is your final destination after everything?
explicacao: Orientação direta de 1. What is your identity?2. What is /are your value(s) to others? and3. Where is your final destination after everything? sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “There are three key questions that must/should guide you in life” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, wisdom-kwashie-mensah-wkm, there, útil em momentos de reflexao.
